description_long: This is a compact, rectangular computer desk with a matte black finish and a simple, modern design. The desk features a pull-out keyboard tray in white, positioned beneath the main desktop surface, and a lower compartment that houses a computer tower. On top of the desk sits a flat-screen monitor with a circular base, and a full-sized keyboard is placed on the tray. The desk has open sides and a solid back panel, providing structural support and some cable management. The overall construction appears to be made from engineered wood or laminate, with plastic and metal components for the computer equipment.
description: A modern black computer desk with a pull-out keyboard tray, computer tower compartment, and a monitor on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the monitor, keyboard tray, and computer tower compartment clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the profile of the monitor and keyboard tray.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel and the back of the monitor and computer tower.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the monitor's profile and the extended keyboard tray.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side features the pull-out keyboard tray and open access to the computer tower compartment, with the monitor positioned centrally on the desktop surface.
